visualizerParams.title: Combination Formula Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The combination (nCr) calculation is failing. It seems the iterative formula for updating the result is incorrect, leading to wrong counts. Find and fix the error.

solution.explanation: The iterative formula for combinations is `res = res * (n - i) / (i + 1)` where `i` goes from 0 to `k-1`. The buggy code used an incorrect indexing in the loop and the numerator, resulting in incorrect products.
